title: carduus vivariensis subsp. assoi
intro: Carduus vivariensis subsp. assoi, also known as Asso's thistle or Asso's cardus, is a plant species within the thistle family that is native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating gastrointestinal issues and as a diuretic. The plant has been reported to have anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may provide health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Carduus vivariensis subsp. assoi include infusions and decoctions, which are often used to treat various health conditions in traditional medicine.
